goal: prevent premium landing pages from treating image-generator still sequences assembled with ffmpeg as true generated video

description: new regression fixture fails because current asset_evidence_lint accepts ffmpeg from Seedream/generated still frames as generated-video

asi.learned: the previous asset evidence gate checked media existence and provenance text but not whether generated-video had actual video-generation provenance
asi.next_action_hint: add video provenance keys and reject ffmpeg still-frame assembly as generated-video

description: add generated-video provenance validation, reject ffmpeg still-frame assembly, and require delegated video phases to actually use video-generation

asi.learned: true generated video needs videoModel/videoProvider/sourceVideo or recognized video app provenance; stills plus ffmpeg should be frame-sequence or prototype
asi.next_action_hint: rerun XR asset generation using the mounted video-generation skill and a video app such as Veo, Seedance, Wan, or HappyHorse
